name: feedpulse-ai
description: FeedPulse - AI powered product feedback platform (microservices)

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/ai-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/feedback-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/gateway" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/ai-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/feedback-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/gateway"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --workspace services/auth-service" "npm run start --workspace services/ai-service" "npm run start --workspace services/feedback-service" "npm run start --workspace services/gateway" "npm run start --workspace frontend"
